content: Lu Yu is a Ph.d. in King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST), under the supervision of Prof. Xiangliang Zhang leading the MINE group. Before joining KAUST, I worked as a Data Mining Engineer at Alibaba Group from 2015.06 - 2016.07. I worked on learning representation of discrete data structure (e.g. graph, seuqence, entity) that intersected with graph theory, optimization, adversarial learning.

title: Lu Yu
